what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for an image asset; it declares the asset's id, address, channel, path, blob reference, MIME type, dimensions, source, authoring session, creation time, and links, and labels it as design-source ground truth.
observations: YAML frontmatter describes an image/jpeg asset named p-03 in the design-source channel under recent-pitches.
Image width and height are both recorded as 0.
The body states 'SOURCE design ground-truth — recent-pitches/p-03.jpg'.
standouts: Recorded image dimensions are 0 despite the asset being image/jpeg.
The asset is tied to a specific blob URI and author session.
It is explicitly tagged as design-source ground truth.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, and provenance fields.
References external binary content via a blob:// URI.
Includes source attribution and authoring session metadata.
Image dimensions are present but not populated.
concerns: Width and height are zero, suggesting missing or failed metadata extraction.
Empty links array leaves the asset isolated from related records.
No visual description, caption, or alt text is provided.
notes: A sparse, blob-referenced catalog stub for a design pitch image with missing dimension and link metadata.
questions: What visual content does recent-pitches/p-03.jpg contain?
Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
Which pitch or project does this image belong to?
Are there related assets that should be listed in links?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to record design-source ground truth for a pitch image; the file does catalog the asset and link to its blob, but it omits image dimensions and any visual description, so it is a partial metadata record.
intention_signals: To maintain a stable, referenceable ledger record for a design pitch image, linking it to its binary blob, authoring session, and creation timestamp for traceability and retrieval.
contribution: It contributes a stable addressable metadata record that links an image asset to its blob, channel, path, source, author session, and creation timestamp, supporting asset provenance and retrieval in a fused system.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter ledger record for the JPEG image asset recent-pitches/p-03 in the design-source channel, referencing blob b2:a8031253c4e3928d6e966642b806790f, with zero recorded dimensions and empty links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and provide ground-truth provenance for a design pitch image so it can be addressed and retrieved within the company substrate.
